description: Horizontal toolbar with a start section (title + child content) and an actions section. Supports sticky positioning to remain visible during scrolling.

examples.title: Toolbar with title and action buttons
examples.code:
<TmToolbar Title="Orders">
    <Actions>
        <TmToolbarButton Text="Export" Icon="download" OnClick="@HandleExport" />
        <TmToolbarButton Text="New" Icon="plus" Variant="ButtonVariant.Primary" OnClick="@HandleNew" />
    </Actions>
</TmToolbar>
